export.description: Exports a JavaScript value, component, or function from an MDX file, making it available for import by other modules. Supports named exports and default exports for layout components.

import.description: Imports JavaScript modules, React components, or other MDX files into the current document, enabling use of external components and utilities within the markdown content.

export default.description: Defines a default export wrapper component that controls the layout of the entire MDX document, receiving the rendered content as children for custom page structure.

JSX Component.description: Embeds a JSX or React component directly within markdown content, passing props and children. Components are resolved from imports or the MDXProvider component mapping context.

MDXProvider.description: A React context provider that supplies custom component mappings to MDX content, allowing replacement of standard HTML elements like h1, p, a, code with custom React components.

components.description: An object mapping HTML tag names to React components used for rendering.

frontmatter.description: YAML metadata block at the top of an MDX file enclosed by triple dashes, defining document properties like title, date, author, and custom fields accessible via props or plugins.

useMDXComponents.description: A React hook that returns the current MDX component mapping from the nearest MDXProvider context, enabling custom components to access and extend the component resolution chain.

remarkPlugins.description: Configuration option specifying remark plugins that transform the markdown AST before compilation, enabling features like GitHub-flavored markdown, math expressions, and custom syntax extensions.

rehypePlugins.description: Configuration option specifying rehype plugins that transform the HTML or JSX AST after markdown processing, enabling features like syntax highlighting, heading anchors, and HTML sanitization.

compile.description: Compiles an MDX string into JavaScript code that exports a React component. Accepts remark and rehype plugins, JSX runtime configuration, and output format options.

evaluate.description: Compiles and evaluates an MDX string at runtime, returning the default export component and any named exports. Requires a JSX runtime to be provided in options.

String.description: Text data type representing a sequence of characters.

Number.description: Numeric data type for integer and floating-point values.

Boolean.description: Logical type with two values: true and false.

Array.description: Ordered collection of elements accessible by index.

Object.description: Collection of key-value pairs (properties and methods).

null.description: Represents the intentional absence of any value.

undefined.description: Represents an uninitialized or missing value.

print.description: Output a value to the standard output stream.

length.description: Returns the number of elements in a collection or characters in a string.
